title: CTOV - Chef's delight Compat
description: Compatibility add-on for Chef's delight mod and CTOV
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Chef's Delight. You will find restaurants in villages. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric. 

**Farmer's Delight mod**

Farmer's Delight mod for forge can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

Farmer's Delight mod for fabric can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)

**Chef's Delight mod**

Chef's Delight mod for fabric can be obtained from [here](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chefs-delight-fabric)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
